title: Generate attribution from the lockfile, not by hand
description: Derive the NOTICE/THIRD-PARTY file mechanically from the resolved dependency set so it cannot drift from what actually ships.
body: Use when a license requires attribution (Apache-2.0, BSD, MIT all require preserving copyright/notice text). Do not maintain a hand-edited credits file. Actions: enumerate the resolved lockfile, collect each component's copyright line and license text, and render a NOTICE/THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES file from that data on every build. Validation signals include a CI check that regenerating attribution produces no diff against the committed file, proving it matches the current lockfile. Risk boundary: shipping without the required notice text for an attribution-requiring license is a compliance breach; if a component lacks recoverable copyright text, escalate.
